import pandas as pd

# Compare the two UK files
backup = pd.read_excel\(''data/input/uk_quota_urls_backup_20260125_040052.xlsx''\)
current = pd.read_excel\(''data/input/uk_quota_urls.xlsx''\)

print\(''=''*80\)
print\(''COMPARING UK QUOTA FILES''\)
print\(''=''*80\)

# Get unique order numbers
backup_orders = set\(backup[''Order Number''].unique\(\)\)
current_orders = set\(current[''Order Number''].unique\(\)\)

print\(f''Backup unique order numbers: {len\(backup_orders\)}''\)
print\(f''Current unique order numbers: {len\(current_orders\)}''\)
print\(\)

# Find differences
only_in_backup = backup_orders - current_orders
only_in_current = current_orders - backup_orders

print\(f''Order numbers ONLY in backup: {sorted\(only_in_backup\)}''\)
print\(f''Order numbers ONLY in current: {sorted\(only_in_current\)}''\)
print\(\)

# Show rows with differences
print\(''\\nROWS WITH DIFFERENCES \(same index, different order number\):''\)
for i in range\(min\(len\(backup\), len\(current\)\)\):
    if backup.iloc[i][''Order Number''] != current.iloc[i][''Order Number'']:
        print\(f''  Row {i}: Backup={backup.iloc[i][""Order Number""]}, Current={current.iloc[i][""Order Number""]}''\)
        print\(f''         Backup: {backup.iloc[i][""Quota Category""]} - {backup.iloc[i][""Country""]}''\)
        print\(f''         Current: {current.iloc[i][""Quota Category""]} - {current.iloc[i][""Country""]}''\)
")

import requests
import time

# Test URLs for UK quota order numbers
test_orders = [
    \(''058019'', ''Rebars All others \(backup\)''\),
    \(''058020'', ''Rebars All others \(current\)''\),
    \(''058130'', ''Rebars Algeria* \(current\)''\),
    \(''058131'', ''Rebars Egypt* \(current\)''\),
    \(''058133'', ''Rebars New Zealand* \(current\)''\),
    \(''058134'', ''Rebars Norway* \(current\)''\),
    \(''058136'', ''Rebars Vietnam* \(current\)''\),
]

print\(''=''*80\)
print\(''TESTING UK QUOTA ORDER NUMBERS''\)
print\(''=''*80\)
print\(''Checking https://www.trade-tariff.service.gov.uk/quota_search?order_number=XXXXXX''\)
print\(\)

for order, desc in test_orders:

    try:
        resp = requests.get\(url, timeout=15\)
        # Check if the page contains quota data or a ""no results"" message
        content = resp.text.lower\(\)
        has_results = ''kilogram'' in content or ''quota definition'' in content
        no_results = ''no quotas found'' in content or ''no results'' in content

        print\(f''{order} \({desc}\): {status}''\)

    time.sleep\(0.5\)

Bash("/c/Users/lyen/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python314/python.exe" -c "
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

def check_quota_page\(order_number\):
    url = f''https://www.trade-tariff.service.gov.uk/quota_search?order_number={order_number}''
    resp = requests.get\(url, timeout=15\)
    soup = BeautifulSoup\(resp.text, ''html.parser''\)
    
    # Find the main content
    main = soup.find\(''main''\)
    if main:
        text = main.get_text\(\)
        # Clean up whitespace
        lines = [l.strip\(\) for l in text.split\(''\\n''\) if l.strip\(\)]
        return ''\\n''.join\(lines[:30]\)  # First 30 non-empty lines
    return ''No main content found''

print\(''=''*80\)
print\(''058019 PAGE CONTENT \(first 30 lines\):''\)
print\(''=''*80\)
print\(check_quota_page\(''058019''\)\)

print\(\)
print\(''=''*80\)
print\(''058020 PAGE CONTENT \(first 30 lines\):''\)
print\(''=''*80\)
print\(check_quota_page\(''058020''\)\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/lyen/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python314/python.exe" -c "
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

def get_quota_results\(order_number\):
    url = f''https://www.trade-tariff.service.gov.uk/quota_search?order_number={order_number}''
    resp = requests.get\(url, timeout=15\)
    soup = BeautifulSoup\(resp.text, ''html.parser''\)
    
    # Look for tables
    tables = soup.find_all\(''table''\)
    if tables:
        result = f''Found {len\(tables\)} table\(s\)\\n''
        for i, table in enumerate\(tables\):
            result += f''\\nTable {i+1}:\\n''
            rows = table.find_all\(''tr''\)
            for row in rows[:5]:  # First 5 rows
                cells = row.find_all\([''th'', ''td'']\)
                result += '' | ''.join\([c.get_text\(\).strip\(\)[:30] for c in cells]\) + ''\\n''
        return result
    
    # Look for no results message
    if ''no quotas'' in resp.text.lower\(\) or ''no results'' in resp.text.lower\(\):
        return ''NO RESULTS FOUND''
    
    # Look for specific quota data sections
    main = soup.find\(''main''\)
    if main:
        text = main.get_text\(\)
        if ''kilogram'' in text.lower\(\):
            return f''QUOTA DATA FOUND \(contains kilogram\)\\n{text[:500]}''
        else:
            return f''PAGE LOADED BUT NO KILOGRAM DATA\\nPage length: {len\(text\)} chars''
    
    return ''COULD NOT PARSE PAGE''

print\(''=''*80\)
print\(''058019 RESULTS:''\)
print\(''=''*80\)
print\(get_quota_results\(''058019''\)\)

print\(\)
print\(''=''*80\)
print\(''058020 RESULTS:''\)
print\(''=''*80\)
print\(get_quota_results\(''058020''\)\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/lyen/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python314/python.exe" -c "
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import re

def get_quota_details\(order_number\):
    url = f''https://www.trade-tariff.service.gov.uk/quota_search?order_number={order_number}''
    resp = requests.get\(url, timeout=15\)
    soup = BeautifulSoup\(resp.text, ''html.parser''\)
    
    # Get page text
    text = soup.get_text\(\)
    
    # Find balance
    balance_match = re.search\(r''\([\\d,]+\\.?\\d*\)\\s*Kilogram'', text\)
    balance_kg = float\(balance_match.group\(1\).replace\('','', ''''\)\) if balance_match else None
    
    # Find validity period
    period_match = re.search\(r''\(\\d{1,2}\\s+\\w+\\s+\\d{4}\)\\s+\(\\d{1,2}\\s+\\w+\\s+\\d{4}\)'', text\)
    period = f''{period_match.group\(1\)} to {period_match.group\(2\)}'' if period_match else None
    
    # Find origin/country - look in table
    tables = soup.find_all\(''table''\)
    origin = None
    if tables:
        for table in tables:
            rows = table.find_all\(''tr''\)
            for row in rows:
                cells = row.find_all\([''th'', ''td'']\)
                if len\(cells\) >= 3:
                    # Check if third column might be country
                    cell_text = cells[2].get_text\(\).strip\(\) if len\(cells\) > 2 else ''''
                    if cell_text and cell_text not in [''Country'', ''Start date'', ''End date'', ''Balance'']:
                        origin = cell_text
                        break
    
    return {
        ''order_number'': order_number,
        ''balance_kg'': balance_kg,
        ''balance_tonnes'': balance_kg / 1000 if balance_kg else None,
        ''validity_period'': period,
        ''origin'': origin
    }

# Get details for new Category 1B order numbers
print\(''=''*80\)
print\(''NEW CATEGORY 1B ORDER NUMBER DETAILS''\)
print\(''=''*80\)

for order in [''058110'', ''058111'', ''058112'']:
    details = get_quota_details\(order\)
    print\(f''\\n{order}:''\)
    for k, v in details.items\(\):
        print\(f''  {k}: {v}''\)
")

import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

def get_full_page_info\(order_number\):
    url = f''https://www.trade-tariff.service.gov.uk/quota_search?order_number={order_number}''
    resp = requests.get\(url, timeout=15\)
    soup = BeautifulSoup\(resp.text, ''html.parser''\)
    
    # Find all table rows
    tables = soup.find_all\(''table''\)
    print\(f''\\n{order_number} - Tables found: {len\(tables\)}''\)
    
    for i, table in enumerate\(tables\):
        print\(f''  Table {i+1}:''\)
        rows = table.find_all\(''tr''\)
        for row in rows[:3]:  # First 3 rows
            cells = row.find_all\([''th'', ''td'']\)
            cell_texts = [c.get_text\(\).strip\(\)[:25] for c in cells]
            print\(f''    {cell_texts}''\)

for order in [''058110'', ''058111'', ''058112'']:
    get_full_page_info\(order\)
")

import requests

# Get raw page content for 058110 to understand the structure better
url = ''https://www.trade-tariff.service.gov.uk/quota_search?order_number=058110''
resp = requests.get\(url, timeout=15\)

# Look for country indicators
content = resp.text

# Common country-related terms
import re

# Find sections that might contain country info
patterns = [
    r''country[:\\s]*\([^<]+\)'',
    r''origin[:\\s]*\([^<]+\)'',
    r''European Union'',
    r''All other'',
    r''Turkey'',
    r''global'',
    r''residual'',
]

print\(''Searching for country/origin indicators in 058110 page...''\)
for p in patterns:
    matches = re.findall\(p, content, re.IGNORECASE\)
    if matches:
        print\(f''  Pattern ""{p}"": {matches[:3]}''\)

# Check if it''s a global/residual quota
if ''All other'' in content or ''global'' in content.lower\(\) or ''residual'' in content.lower\(\):
    print\(''\\nThis appears to be a global/residual quota \(All others\)''\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/lyen/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python314/python.exe" -c "
import requests
import time
import re

# Get opening balances for all new order numbers
new_orders = {
    58110: ''Category 1B Sub-quota 1'',
    58111: ''Category 1B Sub-quota 2'', 
    58112: ''Category 1B Sub-quota 3'',
    58020: ''Rebars All others'',
    58130: ''Rebars Algeria'',
    58131: ''Rebars Egypt'',
    58133: ''Rebars New Zealand'',
    58134: ''Rebars Norway'',
    58136: ''Rebars Vietnam'',
}

print\(''Fetching opening balances for new order numbers...''\)
print\(\)

for order, desc in new_orders.items\(\):
    url = f''https://www.trade-tariff.service.gov.uk/quota_search?order_number={str\(order\).zfill\(6\)}''
    try:
        resp = requests.get\(url, timeout=15\)
        balance_match = re.search\(r''\([\\d,]+\\.?\\d*\)\\s*Kilogram'', resp.text\)
        if balance_match:
            balance_kg = float\(balance_match.group\(1\).replace\('','', ''''\)\)
            balance_tonnes = balance_kg / 1000
            print\(f''{order}: {balance_tonnes:,.0f} tonnes \({desc}\)''\)
        else:
            print\(f''{order}: NO DATA \({desc}\)''\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f''{order}: ERROR - {e}''\)
    time.sleep\(0.3\)
")

import pandas as pd
from openpyxl import load_workbook
import zipfile
import os

# Check the template for slicer information
template_path = ''templates/meps_customer_template.xlsx''

print\(''=''*80\)
print\(''TEMPLATE SLICER ANALYSIS''\)
print\(''=''*80\)

# Read template as xlsx \(zipfile\)
with zipfile.ZipFile\(template_path, ''r''\) as zf:
    # List files in archive
    files = zf.namelist\(\)
    slicer_files = [f for f in files if ''slicer'' in f.lower\(\)]
    print\(f''Slicer-related files: {slicer_files}''\)
    
    # Check for slicerCaches
    cache_files = [f for f in files if ''slicerCache'' in f]
    print\(f''Slicer cache files: {cache_files}''\)

# Read the UK sheet to see current data structure
wb = load_workbook\(template_path\)
print\(f''\\nSheets: {wb.sheetnames}''\)

# Check UK sheet structure
uk_ws = wb[''United Kingdom'']
print\(f''\\nUK Sheet structure:''\)
print\(f''Dimensions: {uk_ws.dimensions}''\)

# Find the data table header row
for row in range\(1, 20\):
    cell_a = uk_ws.cell\(row, 1\).value
    if cell_a and ''Quota Category'' in str\(cell_a\):
        print\(f''Header row found at: {row}''\)
        headers = []
        for col in range\(1, 8\):
            val = uk_ws.cell\(row, col\).value
            if val:
                headers.append\(val\)
        print\(f''Headers: {headers}''\)
        break
")
